titles.title: I Need You Lord - Revised Version

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You alone are what I need Only You Lord I seek Without You where can I ever be Won't You come to me Or I'll perish without Thee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need You, Lord I need Your touch once more Your Presence strengthens my soul Nothing can satisfy but You Oh Lord I need You now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am O Lord my God Your Holy Spirit, I need To face the threats of the enemies Please come now to me Or I can't live without Thee

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I just can't make it through Without You I just can't live without You No, No, No, No, Lord (2x)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We need You, Lord We need You, Lord, right now We need You, Lord We need You, Lord, right now We lift our hands and bow our knees To worship at Your throne We need You, Lord We need You, Lord, right now
